questions.prompt: Which contact path is correct for a Critical incident requiring a phone callback during the active investigation?
choices: Call the main Huntress sales line
Use Request SOC Support inside the Critical incident report and choose Callback
Open a ticket on the partner portal status page
questions.explanation: Critical reports unlock the Request SOC Support button, which offers Email, Chat, and Callback. Callback is reserved for Critical reports and the call comes from 1-833-486-8669.

questions.prompt: A platform problem (failed PSA integration, agent install loop) should go to SOC Support.
questions.explanation: SOC Support handles incident-related questions. Platform problems go to Product Support via the Help icon's Live Chat path or the standard support channels.
